text.title: API Monitoring — Structured Logging Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to apply API Monitoring — Structured Logging end-to-end. Each step has named input, action, and output. Decision gates reference rules from `01-core-rules.xml`.

step.name: adopt-json-logger
step.action: Replace text logger with a JSON logger (structlog, pino, logback-json). Mandatory fields: timestamp, level, request_id, http.method, http.path, http.status, duration_ms.

step.name: propagate-request-id
step.action: Generate or accept X-Request-ID at ingress; propagate to all downstream calls and to logs at every hop.

step.name: install-redaction
step.action: Add redaction middleware that strips password / token / pii fields by key allow/deny list before serialization (r4).

step.name: ship-and-correlate
step.action: Configure shipping (fluentbit/vector/promtail) to the central index. Verify request_id-based correlation across at least 2 services.

section.title: Decision gates
section.p: Between steps, consult `content/06-decision-tree.xml` if the observed signal does not match expected output. The decision tree always terminates at a rule id from `01-core-rules.xml` or at `skip-this-methodology`.
